title: Create templates for Portfolio projects
excerpt:

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml:
How do I set boards as templates for Portfolio projects?

I have templates set in the usual way:

But they don’t show up when creating a new portfolio project:

Or when using a Portfolio automation:

image961×487 30.7 KB

posts.author: SylvainM (Sylvain Marchiset)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Christine,
I think that you need to create your template from a project, not from a board.
You have to “create a project” in your workspace first, then to select the project and choose “Save as template”.
It will keep the project icon

instead of the template icon

but it is a template and it will be made available in the list when you create a project directly within the portfolio.
